name: Kita no Kaiou
description: North Kaio (北の界王, Kita no Kaiō?) (English dubs: King Kai, North Kai) is the Kaio of the quadrant of the galaxy where the planets Earth and Namek reside. In the English manga, he is also known as Kaiô-sama or Lord of the Worlds. Claiming himself to be very humorous; he will only teach his subordinates if they laugh at his non-comedic jokes (really bad puns in the original Japanese). name: Luna
description: Luna, a Dryad from the Spirit Tribe, was sacrificed to Shadow Knight in order to protect their village. At Sora's request, Rein helped her and her older twin sister by defeating Shadow Knight. Along with Sora, decided to join his party, making them his third and fourth contractual.

name: Mari Tsutsui
description: Mari-chan is a tsundere girl who loves her best friend Anna and truly hates men. But above all, she hates Natsuki, who tries to steal Anna from her and Tomoya, who for some reason seems to be interested in Mari.

name: Marie Mjolnir
description: The Death Scythe formerly in charge of Oceania. However, after the resurrection of [Asura](https://anilist.co/character/15840/Asura), her duties were reassigned to [Azusa](https://anilist.co/character/15770/Yumi-Azusa). She is currently partnered with [Stein](https://anilist.co/character/8446/Franken-Stein) and is an instructor at the DWMA. name: Mayoi Ayase
description: A perverse individual who adores anyone and anything that's fragile and child-like. He sometimes blurts out his true thoughts without thinking. Though he has a cowardly and servile personality, he can't ignore a person in need. He seems to struggle with going out in public. With a voice that wavers deeply as he sings, his performances are soft and lingering. Mayoi is a very skittish and reclusive person, and will avoid direct contact with others as much as possible, or run and hide when he gets

name: Mei Yoneme
description: **Height:** 155cm Mei Yoneme is a main character in Love Live! Superstar!!. She is currently a second year student at Yuigaoka Girls' High School. She is both a second-generation member of Liella! and a member of the sub-unit CatChu!. Her image color is red. When Mei was younger, she was told she had a scary look, and all of her friends were scared of her. Mei is very shy and doesn't like it when people say nasty things about her. name: Minamo Kurosawa
description: A gym teacher at the girls' school. In the girls' first year of high school, she is the homeroom teacher of Class 5. During their last two years, she is the homeroom teacher of Class 2. An old high school friend and rival of Yukari, they have a juvenile, exasperating, but funny relationship with each other; Yukari relentlessly insults and freeloads from Nyamo, but Nyamo gets her digs in, too. "Nyamo" is a nickname from her student days, but Yukari calls her that, and so does Tomo. Other students

name: Mugi Nekozane
description: A strange girl that is very fond of cats. Appears somewhat apathetic and expressionless towards her peers, often keeping to herself, but after meeting Minato she begins to open herself up more.
mediaTitles: Learning to Love My Cat-like Classmate
searchTerms: Learning to Love My Cat-like Classmate

name: Muse
description: The fairy of water and the leader of the fairies of Elementario. Muse has a very energetic and cheerful personality and she is often seen with a smile on her face. Despite the lack of popularity of the Elementario, she still works hard. Of the four fairies, she is the best at singing. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Nemesis
description: Ray's Type Maiden with Arms Embryo. ~!Her second form is the Flag Halberd.!~ ~!Her third form is a shield.!~ ~!Her fourth form is a floating mirror with two daggers attached.!~

name: Piscalat
description: __Race:__ Demon Piscalat is a General of the Zoble army. She leads the army with overwhelming power, but is a naive and shy maiden when it comes to sexual matters. She was leading the army into plundering and raping citizens, but Oobami summoned her back to the capital.

name: Regto
description: The man who raised [Rudo](https://anilist.co/character/266433/Rudo) after he lost his parents. He gave Rudo a pair of gloves. (Source: Official Site)

name: Ren
description: Part of the Assassins Guild, whose members all have bounties on their heads. Members of this guild are all born with a condition affecting their mana, known as “The Blighted”, and in Ren's case she is able to secrete poison through her skin, earning her the name "Ren the Poison Moth." Normally wears heavy clothing, and when her skin is exposed she is capable of spreading poison around an area. A bit of a tomboy, who has a shy personality thanks to her power. (Source: Official Site)

name: Ren Ichimoku
description: An assistant of Enma Ai who appears to be a handsome young man with one eye covered by hair. He can manifest a single, very large eye that can be directed anywhere, allowing him to see through walls. This manifests as an eye on a wall. The large eye can also be used as a weapon, by projecting intense flashes of light. When so required, Ichimoku Ren becomes a blue straw doll by kissing a pendant he wears around his neck. description: __School:__ Namimori Junior High __Vongola Ring:__ Ring of Sun __Box Weapon:__ Kangaryuu/Canguro del Sereno ver. Vongola Sasagawa Ryohei is obsessed with boxing and is one of the oldest Vongola Ring Guardians. He is the older brother of Kyoko Sasagawa, a girl that Tsuna has a crush on. name: Sanzou Genjou
description: __Height:__ 176.5 cm (5'9") Genjou Sanzo, commonly referred to as simply Sanzo, is hardly the traditional image of a Buddhist priest; he is ill-tempered, swears, eats meat, drinks, and is usually seen with a cigarette hanging from his lips. As a Sanzo priest, he is tasked with protecting the sacred Maten Scripture, one of The Founding Scriptures of Heaven and Earth. name: Setsu
description: As a Federal Galactic Army Special Forces solider, they are in charge of the elimination of the Gnosia. They often support Yuri, who has lost their memory.

description: __Race:__ Human, Fullbringer __Height:__ 198 cm Tsukishima is the former leader of Xcution, an organization created by himself by gathering people with the same goal as him - erasing their own power. name: Titania
description: Titania is the queen of the fairies and wife to Oberon. She looks like a beautiful woman riding a donkey. She is an acquaintance of Elias Ainsworth and appears to know something about his origin. She does not discriminate against Elias for being a part fairy and part something else.
mediaTitles: The Ancient Magus' Bride: The Boy from the West and the Knight of the Blue Storm

name: Tusk
description: A shadow Sung Jin-Woo gained after entering the Hunters Guild Gate. ~!Tusk is a shadow of Kargalgan, originally a High Orc Shaman defeated by Jinwoo Sung during the Hunters Guild Gate Arc. After being resurrected, Tusk becomes one of Jinwoo's most potent magic users, known for his devastating area-of-effect spells and high intelligence. Even as a Shadow, Tusk kept his powerful abilities and spells, making him just as capable and even stronger than when he was alive.!~
mediaTitles: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-
